speaker: Filippo
text: Listen... stop saying "eh wake up" "ridiculous" "you need to study more and better" and all this stuff fuck... because I would probably already be graduated in two months, but if I'm in such a shitty situation that I can't do anything, I'm depressed and in total solitude and, like, today I barely touched food and I want to kill myself from how tired I am of living and my ability to study is nothing compared to normal it's because most of it is your fault and you know it well!!
